attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
   SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT  AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.SALES_ORDER_KEY     AS SALES_ORDER_KEY
   ,COALESCE(SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_NEW_RENEW_SOL_KEY,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER))  AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY /*Modified as part of PR18374 */
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.PRODUCT_KEY        AS PRODUCT_KEY
   ,COALESCE(RBT_ADJ_LINE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER))       AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY /*Modified as part of PR18374 */
   ,COALESCE(RBT_ADJ_LINE.AR_TRX_KEY,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER))       AS AR_TRX_KEY /*Modified as part of PR18374 */
   /*,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)       AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY
   ,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)        AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   ,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)        AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   ,NCA.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY        AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY */
   /* Modified the below derivations as part of Q3FY16 Manual Transaction Customer & Partner Reporting Project */
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.END_CUST_REBOK_CUST_KEY        AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY
    ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.BILL_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY      AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.SHIP_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY     AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
    ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.SOLD_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY     AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   ,CASE 
    WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE IN ('TWO TIER DISTRIBUTOR','2-TIER DISTRIBUTOR','Two Tier Distributor') 
     THEN CAST (-777 AS INTEGER)
    ELSE COALESCE( SALES_ADJ_LINE.END_CUST_REBOK_CUST_KEY , CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)) 
    END          AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME     AS TRANSACTION_DATETIME
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY      AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER      AS SALES_REP_NUMBER
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.PROCESS_DATE       AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT     AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
   ,COALESCE(SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_BK_NEW_RENEW_POS_TRX_ID_INT,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)) AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT /*Modified as part of PR18374 */
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT     AS BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT     AS BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
   ,SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_TYPE_CODE      AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE     AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE
   ,CAST('UNKNOWN' AS VARCHAR(15))    AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE                  /*'UNKNOWN'   AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE:Modified as part of OA-POS Q1FY15*/
   ,SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_IDE_ADJ_CODE      AS IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE
   ,SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE        AS ADJUSTMENT_CODE
   ,'SLS_ADJ'         AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
   ,'N'          AS CANCELLED_FLG
   ,'='          AS CANCEL_CODE
   ,'N'          AS ACQUISITION_FLG
   ,'='          AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG      AS DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG         AS CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG  /* Modified as part of true demand bkgs definition*/    
   ,'N'          AS OVERLAY_FLG
   ,'Y'          AS IC_REVENUE_FLG
   ,'N'          AS CHARGES_FLG
   ,'N'          AS SALESREP_FLG
   ,'N'          AS MISC_FLG
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG      AS SERVICE_FLG
   ,'N'          AS INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG
   ,'N'          AS REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG
   ,'Y'          AS REVENUE_FLG
   ,'N'          AS RMA_FLG
   ,CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))      AS TRADE_IN_AMOUNT
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT  AS DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT  AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.COST_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT        AS DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
   ,CASE 
    WHEN BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE = 'RF' 
	    THEN CAST (SALES_ADJ_LINE.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_1_TXT AS DECIMAL(18,6))
    WHEN SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE LIKE 'AC%' 
         THEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.TRANSACTION_QTY	
    ELSE CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) 
   END          AS DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
   ,CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))      AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT
   ,CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))      AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
   ,CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))                       AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT
   ,CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))                       AS DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY
   ,CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))                       AS DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
   ,CASE WHEN COALESCE(SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,-999)>0 THEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
		 WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE IN ('DVAD' , 'Two Tier Distributor') AND IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE NOT  IN ('RB','RB1') THEN COALESCE(N_DISTI.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,-999)
		 ELSE CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)
	END AS WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT/*Modified code as part of PR18948 */
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.EDW_CREATE_USER      AS EDW_CREATE_USER
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.EDW_UPDATE_USER      AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
   ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)         AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
   ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)         AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
   ,1          AS CONVERSION_RT 
   ,NULL         AS CONVERSION_DT 
   ,NSOT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT       AS DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT 
   ,CAST (NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))      AS DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM 
   ,NULL         AS DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE 
   ,NULL         AS DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD 
   ,'USD'         AS DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD 
   ,CAST('L' AS VARCHAR(3))    AS DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE /* 'L' AS DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE:Modified as part of OA-POS Q1FY15*/
   ,COALESCE(MAD.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY,'-999')      AS ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY
   ,'I'          AS ACTION_CODE
   ,'I'          AS DML_TYPE
   ,NULL         AS DV_TRANSACTION_NAME  /**R9**/
   ,100         AS BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT   /**R9**/
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    AS  DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG  /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/    
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             AS  DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG     /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/   
   ,COALESCE(RBT_ADJ_LINE.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,SALES_ADJ_LINE.ATTRIBUTION_CD,'STANDALONE')         AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD /*Modified as part of PR18374 */
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.PRODUCT_KEY      AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY
   ,COALESCE(SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_NEW_RENEW_SOL_KEY,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER))  AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY /*Modified as part of PR18374 */
   ,COALESCE(RBT_ADJ_LINE.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER))          AS SK_OFFER_ATTRBUTION_ID_INT   /*Modified as part of PR18374 */
   ,CASE WHEN TRIM(SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_IDE_ADJ_CODE) IN ('FMV-REL','FMV-RES') THEN 'Y' /* Added as part of FMV OneCAT Q2FY15*/
      ELSE 'N' END AS DV_FMV_FLG           /* Added as part of FMV OneCAT Q2FY15*/
   ,COALESCE(SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_NEW_RENEW_DSV_FLG,'N') AS DSV_FLG /*Added as part of PR18374 */
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_LINT AS DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT /* Modified as part of FY18 May Release*/
   ,CAL.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT 
   ,COALESCE(RBT_ADJ_LINE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)) AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/ /*Modified as part of PR18374 */
      ,-999 AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
   ,COALESCE(NDL.BK_DEAL_ID,'-9999')  AS  DV_DEAL_ID /*added for DEAL_ID*/ 
	,-999 TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY  /*4 columns added as part of BGM Q1FY17*/
	,0 DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT
	,0 DV_BGM_COST_AMOUNT
	,0 DV_FX_NET_PRICE_AMT
,COALESCE(SALES_ADJ_LINE.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT, CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)))AS DV_LOCAL_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_AMT 
 ,COALESCE(CASE
WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.TRANSACTION_QTY=0 THEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT /*Added as part of handling 0 scenario by gmaharan*/
 WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.TRANSACTION_QTY<0 THEN
 CAST(SALES_ADJ_LINE.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT/SALES_ADJ_LINE.TRANSACTION_QTY AS DECIMAL(18,6))*-1
 ELSE CAST(SALES_ADJ_LINE.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT/SALES_ADJ_LINE.TRANSACTION_QTY AS DECIMAL(18,6))END ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))) AS LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT     
 ,COALESCE(CASE 
 WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.TRANSACTION_QTY=0 THEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT /*Added as part of handling 0 scenario by gmaharan*/
 WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.TRANSACTION_QTY<0 THEN
 CAST(SALES_ADJ_LINE.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT/SALES_ADJ_LINE.TRANSACTION_QTY AS DECIMAL(18,6))*-1
 ELSE CAST(SALES_ADJ_LINE.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT/SALES_ADJ_LINE.TRANSACTION_QTY AS DECIMAL(18,6))END ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)))AS  DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT
,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_ORDER_VALUE_USD_AMOUNT
,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_MTHLY_RCR_REV_TRXL_USD_AMT  
,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_INCRML_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_ANNLZD_MTHY_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_INCRML_ANNL_RCRR_RV_USD_AMT 
,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6))DV_PURCHASE_ADJ_DSCNT_USD_AMT /*Q1FY18 PA*/ 
,0 DV_BGM_NON_STANDARD_COST_AMT,
SALES_ADJ_LINE.SALES_MOTION_CD AS SALES_MOTION_CD,
0 DV_BKG_REBATE_AMT,
0 DV_FX_REBATE_PRICE_AMT,
-999 AS SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY /* Added as part of SALES FY18 May12Rel */
,COALESCE(RBT_ADJ_LINE.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)) AS ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY /*Added as part of PR18374 */
,SALES_ADJ.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CODE AS SALES_ADJUSTMENT_SOURCE_CODE /*Added as part of PR18374 */
/* ADDED AS PART OF ACV_SCALE*/
,SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
,SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM AS RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
,SALES_ADJ_LINE.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG AS DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG
,SALES_ADJ_LINE.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT AS DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
,SALES_ADJ_LINE.DV_MULTI_YEAR_US_NET_AMT AS DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
,SALES_ADJ_LINE.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION AS DV_CONTRACT_DURATION
,SALES_ADJ_LINE.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS SOURCE_REP_ANNUAL_USD_AMT  
,CASE WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_6_TXT = 'UNKNOWN' THEN -999 ELSE SALES_ADJ_LINE.IDE_IFC_COMMENT_6_TXT END AS SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
,SALES_ADJ_LINE.DV_ANNUITY_RELEASE_FLAG		/*Added as part of iACV Dec rel */
,SALES_ADJ_LINE.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,SALES_ADJ_LINE.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,SALES_ADJ_LINE.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,SALES_ADJ_LINE.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT_LINE SALES_ADJ_LINE
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ADJUSTMENT SALES_ADJ
   ON SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT = SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
   AND SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_TYPE_CODE <> 'POS'
   AND SALES_ADJ_LINE.IDE_IFC_ADJ_REPORTING_TYPE_CD <>'M'
  /*  Commented the below join as part of Q3FY16 Manual Transaction Customer & Partner Reporting Project
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT NCA
   ON SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER = NCA.BK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_NUMBER */
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT
   ON SALES_ADJ_LINE.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION MAD
   ON MAD.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR = SALES_ADJ_LINE.SRC_RPTD_ADDITIONAL_CMNT_TXT
  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR CAL /*added this join to derive new column quarter number*/
      ON SALES_ADJ_LINE.PROCESS_DATE=CAL.CALENDAR_DATE
 /*added for DEAL_ID*/ 
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL NDL
  ON TRIM(SALES_ADJ_LINE.IDE_IFC_IDE_REPORTED_DEAL_ID)=NDL.BK_DEAL_ID
 /*END-DEAL_ID*/ 
 LEFT JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_REBATE_ADJUSTMENT_LINE_NRT_TV RBT_ADJ_LINE
 ON SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT = RBT_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT
     AND RBT_ADJ_LINE.END_TV_DTM ='3500-01-01 00:00:00' /*Added as part of PR18374 */
/*Added below code as part of PR18948 */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_ERP_POS_BILLTO MT_BILLTO 
     ON (MT_BILLTO.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = SALES_ADJ_LINE.BILL_TO_REBOK_CUST_KEY
	 AND (COALESCE(SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_NEW_RENEW_SOL_KEY,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER))>0 OR COALESCE(RBT_ADJ_LINE.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER))>0))
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CUST_ACCT_WITH_WIPS_DISTRI N_DISTI
     ON MT_BILLTO.ERP_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY = N_DISTI.CUSTOMER_ACCT_KEY 
  WHERE
   SALES_ADJ_LINE.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME >'$$LastExtractDate'
   UNION ALL
  SELECT 
   SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT      AS BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.SALES_ORDER_KEY       AS SALES_ORDER_KEY   
   ,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)        AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.PRODUCT_KEY          AS PRODUCT_KEY
   ,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)        AS AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
   ,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)        AS AR_TRX_KEY
   ,COALESCE(POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY ,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER))   AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY
   ,COALESCE(POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_BILL_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  ,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER))  AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   ,COALESCE(POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_SHIP_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  ,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER))  AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   ,COALESCE(POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY  ,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER))  AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY
   ,CASE 
    WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG = 'Y'
     THEN CAST (-888 AS INTEGER)
    ELSE COALESCE(POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY ,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)) 
   END          AS DV_END_CUSTOMER_KEY
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME      AS TRANSACTION_DATETIME
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY       AS SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER       AS SALES_REP_NUMBER
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.PROCESS_DATE        AS BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT      AS DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
   ,COALESCE(POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT ,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER))  AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT      AS BK_SALES_ADJ_LINE_NUMBER_INT
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT      AS BK_SALES_ADJ_NUMBER_INT
   ,SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_TYPE_CODE       AS ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE      AS SALES_CHANNEL_CODE
   ,'UNKNOWN'          AS SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE
   ,SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_IDE_ADJ_CODE       AS IDE_ADJUSTMENT_CODE
   ,SALES_ADJ.BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE         AS ADJUSTMENT_CODE
   ,'POS_ADJ'          AS BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
   ,'N'           AS CANCELLED_FLG
   ,'='           AS CANCEL_CODE
   ,'N'           AS ACQUISITION_FLG
   ,'='           AS FORWARD_REVERSE_FLG
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG      AS DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLG
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG         AS CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG  /* Modified as part of true demand bkgs definition*/  
   ,'N'           AS OVERLAY_FLG
   ,'Y'           AS IC_REVENUE_FLG
   ,'N'           AS CHARGES_FLG
   ,'N'           AS SALESREP_FLG
   ,'N'           AS MISC_FLG
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG       AS SERVICE_FLG
   ,'N'           AS INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG
   ,'N'           AS REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG
   ,'Y'           AS REVENUE_FLG
   ,'N'           AS RMA_FLG
   ,CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS TRADE_IN_AMOUNT
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.SELLING_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT      AS DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT      AS DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.COST_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT       AS DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
   ,CASE 
        WHEN BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE = 'RF' 
          THEN CAST (IDE_IFC_COMMENT_1_TXT AS DECIMAL(18,6)) 
	    WHEN BK_SALES_ADJ_CODE  LIKE 'AC%' 
	      THEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.TRANSACTION_QTY
        ELSE CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6)) 
   END           AS DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
   ,CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT
   ,CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
   ,CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT
   ,CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY
   ,CAST(0.000000 AS DECIMAL(18,6))       AS DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
   ,COALESCE(POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,CAST(-999 AS INTEGER)) AS WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.EDW_CREATE_USER       AS EDW_CREATE_USER
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.EDW_UPDATE_USER       AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
   ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)          AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME
   ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)         AS EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME
   ,1           AS CONVERSION_RT 
   ,NULL          AS CONVERSION_DT 
   ,NSOT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT        AS DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT 
   ,CAST (NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0))        AS DD_CISCO_BOOKED_DTM 
   ,NULL          AS DD_SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE 
   ,NULL          AS DD_SLS_ORD_OPERATING_UNIT_CD 
   ,'USD'          AS DD_TRX_CURRENCY_CD 
   ,'L'          AS DV_TRANSACTION_TYPE  
   ,COALESCE(MAD.ADJUSTMENT_DESCR_KEY,'-999')       AS ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION_KEY
   ,'I'           AS ACTION_CODE
   ,'I'           AS DML_TYPE
   ,NULL           AS DV_TRANSACTION_NAME  /**R9**/
   ,100          AS BOOKINGS_SPLIT_PCT  /**R9**/
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG    AS  DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG  /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/    
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG             AS  DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG     /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/ 
      ,'STANDALONE'           AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.PRODUCT_KEY      AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY
   ,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)       AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
   ,CAST(-9999 AS INTEGER)             AS SK_OFFER_ATTRBUTION_ID_INT 
   ,'N' AS DV_FMV_FLG                /* Added as part of FMV OneCAT Q2FY15*/
   ,'N' AS DSV_FLG /*Added as part of PR18374 */
   ,SALES_ADJ_LINE.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_LINT  AS DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT /* Modified as part of FY18 May Release*/
      ,CAL.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT AS FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
   ,AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
      ,-999 AS XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY/*Added as part of Q3FY16-Offer Attribution*/
   ,COALESCE(POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_DEAL_ID,'-9999') AS  DV_DEAL_ID /*added for DEAL_ID*/
   	,-999 TSS_COUNTRY_FACTOR_KEY  /*4 columns added as part of BGM Q1FY17*/
	,0 DV_BKG_GROSS_MGN_AMOUNT
	,0 DV_BGM_FX_COST_AMOUNT

 ,COALESCE(CASE WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.TRANSACTION_QTY<0 THEN
 CAST(SALES_ADJ_LINE.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT/SALES_ADJ_LINE.TRANSACTION_QTY AS DECIMAL(18,6))*-1
 ELSE CAST(SALES_ADJ_LINE.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT/SALES_ADJ_LINE.TRANSACTION_QTY AS DECIMAL(18,6))END ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)))AS LOCAL_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_AMT     
 ,COALESCE(CASE WHEN SALES_ADJ_LINE.TRANSACTION_QTY<0 THEN
 CAST(SALES_ADJ_LINE.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT/SALES_ADJ_LINE.TRANSACTION_QTY AS DECIMAL(18,6))*-1
 ELSE CAST(SALES_ADJ_LINE.BASE_PRICE_DOLLAR_ADJ_AMT/SALES_ADJ_LINE.TRANSACTION_QTY AS DECIMAL(18,6))END ,CAST(0.0 AS DECIMAL(18,6)))AS  DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT

   ON  SALES_ADJ_LINE.RU_BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = POS_TRAN_LINE.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT
   ON SALES_ADJ_LINE.SALES_ORDER_KEY = NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_ADJUSTMENT_DESCRIPTION MAD

  INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR CAL  /*added this join to derive new column quarter number*/
